response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with strong architectural capabilities and a solid open-source background. However, he is primarily an Individual Contributor (IC) and lacks the executive-level leadership, formal team management track record, and IT consulting focus required for a Head of Development role. Crucially, his German language proficiency is only 'Basic', which directly disqualifies him from the mandatory C1 requirement needed to advise clients in this position.
strengths: Extensive experience in modern software architecture and open-source technologies.
Proven track record of technical excellence as a Staff/Senior Engineer at top-tier companies like Stripe and Shopify.
Strong background in Linux, microservices, and high-performance system design.
concerns: Basic German language skills fall significantly short of the required C1 proficiency for client communication.
Lacks a proven track record in executive-level leadership and formal team management.
Missing explicit experience in UML modeling, IT security compliance, and Python as requested in the job description.
